description: In this episode, Anatoly interviews Daffy Durairaj, co-founder of Mango Markets, discussing his journey into crypto, algorithmic trading, and the development of trading tools on the Serum Dex.
topic_summary: Daffy shares his background in algorithmic trading, his initial reluctance to enter crypto, and how he became involved with Mango Markets and Serum Dex [t=0:24-240:15].
